items.prompt: After this course you should be able to…
choices: Navigate panes, control time, wave, and poke/force safely in the IDE

items.prompt: A sensible next course for offline fidelity is…
items.explain: Offline sim courses follow this path.

items.prompt: If you mostly did browser labs, a good wrap action is…
choices: Recreate a tour + waves session in the public IDE
items.explain: Transfer literacy into the live IDE.

items.prompt: Knowing which file is top and reading the Console are lasting simulator habits.
items.explain: Top + Console prevent many false debug paths.
